results.title: Fundraiser to grant car-mad boy with rare illness joy and memories
results.description: A fundraiser has been launched to support a local seven-year-old boy from Beccles who has been diagnosed with an incredibly rare, life-limiting condition.

results.title: Sai Life Sciences Announces Talent Acquisition Campaign to Augment Process and Analytical R & D Leadership Capacity
results.description: Hyderabad (Telangana) [India], June 26: Sai Life Sciences (BSE: 544306 I NSE: SAILIFE), one of India's fastest growing, innovator-focused Contract Research, Development and Manufacturing Organizations (CRDMOs), today announced plans to strengthen its Process & Analytical R & D (PR & D and AR & D) capabilities through the recruitment of scientific team leaders and group leaders across multiple advanced modalities and technology platforms.

results.title: Leeds United star given big chance as boss makes international decision and opposition confirmed
results.description: A Leeds United star’s big chance after an international boss decision.

results.title: Businessman Found Dead at Bigg Boss Kannada Actress Krishi Thapanda's Bengaluru Flat, Probe Underway
results.description: A case of unnatural death has drawn Bigg Boss Kannada actress Krishi Thapanda into an ongoing police investigation after a Bengaluru-based businessman was found dead at her RR Nagar apartment on the night of June 24, 2026. The deceased, identified as Vaishak, had reportedly contacted Krishi before the incident. With no suicide note recovered from the scene, Bengaluru police have registered a case and are awaiting autopsy results. Here is a complete account of what is known so far.

results.title: International Day Against Drug Abuse: Bhagwant Mann Government Reiterates Commitment to Drug-Free Society
results.description: On the occasion of the International Day Against Drug Abuse and Illicit Trafficking, the Pungovernment reaffirmed its commitment to combating drug abuse and narcotics trafficking through sustained enforcement, public awareness, and community participation. results.title: Infrastructure meant for 'potential expansion of aggression': Zelenskyy warns of Belarus military build-up near border
results.description: Ukraine's leader, President Zelenskyy, has raised serious concerns about Belarus, which he believes is enhancing military setups near their shared boundary, potentially igniting broader hostilities. Kyiv has appealed to Minsk for a halt to these actions. However, Belarusian President Lukashenko refutes these allegations and advises Ukraine not to provoke any involvement. While Belarus isn't actively combatting, it remains aligned with Russia, hosting troops and nuclear capabilities.

results.title: How lifelong learning helps older adults stay sharp and connected
results.description: From poetry classes to crochet groups, older adults are finding that learning new skills can support brain health, build confidence and deepen social connection.
